meaning: n.鑰惰矾鎾掑喎(宸村嫆鏂潶钁楀悕鍙ゅ煄)
examples: Jerusalem is Christianity's most venerated place.
The documentary premiered at the Jerusalem Film Festival.
Linda Gradstein has this report from Jerusalem, which was cleared by an Israeli censor.
Jerusalem is older than the Bible and Tel Aviv is a thoroughly modern metropolis.
Cohen, 56, began his career refining the solar thermal process at Jerusalem's Hebrew University in 1977.
